title: PONEX ModPack
description: This modpack is designed as part of PONEX server development. Feel free to install it and play. It has many optimisation mods and extra stuff for fun play with your friends.
body:
## ENG

**What is this modpack designed for?**

This modpack was created specifically for PONEX server | IP: [mc.ponex.su](https://mc.ponex.su/)

Modpack adds optimization and several visual mods for a pleasant game on the server.

## РУС

**Для чего создан этот модпак?**

Этот модпак сделан специально для сервера PONEX | IP: [mc.ponex.su](https://mc.ponex.su/)

Модпак добавляет оптимизацию и несколько визуальных модов для приятной игры на сервере.
